questionHtml:
Which is the correct equation for the electrolysis of molten sodium chloride?

A.  2NaCl (l) → 2Na (l) + Cl2 (g)

B.  2NaCl (s) → 2Na (s) + Cl2 (g)

C.  2NaCl (l) → 2Na (s) + Cl2 (g)

D.  2NaCl (aq) → 2Na (s) + Cl2 (g)

meta.title: Which is the correct equation for the electrolysis of molten sodium chloride? A. 2NaCl (l) → 2Na (l) + Cl2 (g) B. 2NaCl (s) → 2Na (s) + Cl2 (g) C. 2NaCl (l) → 2Na (s) + Cl2 (g) D.
